title: Modular Cookbooks Split
desc: Decouple monolithic cookbook-recipes.html into highly-focused conceptual chapters with LaTeX mathematical proofs.

title: Accordion Navigation Sidebar
desc: Build clean, title-cased hierarchical directories with solid track-lines, interactive category expansion, and responsive collapse hooks.

title: Wide Layout Switching & Fluid Prose
desc: Enable full-bleed widescreen toggle to let complex math and proofs expand fully to the page margins, optimizing readouts for large developer monitors.

title: Smart Scroll-to-Top Indicator
desc: Add a smooth-scrolling floating capsule that appears when scrolling down, allowing instant jumps back to the page header.

title: Local JSON Folder Sync
desc: Enable local filesystem synchronization specifically for TableMetadata and Manifest JSON files to dynamically parse, inspect, and validate changes locally using modern File System Access APIs.

title: GitHub PR/Issue Collection
desc: Integrate with the GitHub API to dynamically collect and track relevant Iceberg repository PRs, issues, and discussions by category.

title: V-Spec, Binding Differences, & Feature Interactions
desc: Establish formal reference specs mapping version differences (Spec v1 vs v2 vs v3), runtime binding capabilities (Java, Python, Rust, C++), and complex feature interactions.

title: Roadmaps, Goals, & Project Management
desc: Build direct project management modules, scheduling goals, and release roadmaps to bridge community developer timelines.

title: Google Docs Change Proposal Integration
desc: Integrate and track community-led Google Docs proposals, design drafts, and RFC updates for the Apache Iceberg spec directly in the wiki explorer.

title: Dynamic Notes & Annotations
desc: Enable inline notes, bookmarks, and rich comment annotations for engineers to capture custom thoughts, review logs, and audit tips per concept.
